limitations: No quantified AI investment amounts, headcount, or named AI programs disclosed in the excerpts; investment intensity scored 2 based on generic references to CNA's own AI use without named programs or dollar figures.

AI narrative concreteness scored 3: named use cases (underwriting, claims, fraud detection) and specific risk mechanisms described, but no deployment status confirmation or quantified business results provided.

AI risk disclosure is detailed and company-specific (underwriting bias, hallucination, data privacy, regulatory) with named mechanisms of harm, supporting score 4; no quantified risk exposure or named governance body found to justify score 5.
Boardwalk Pipelines references to AI data centers as demand drivers are customer-side market observations, not Loews/Boardwalk AI investment disclosures.
